title: Restore Database from Backup
description: Procedure to restore PostgreSQL from RDS backup.
steps: Identify restore point: latest snapshot or point-in-time
Wait for instance to become available (10-30 min)
Update security group to allow access from K8s nodes
Verify data: connect and run integrity checks
If replacing primary: update service DATABASE_URL config
Restart affected services to pick up new connection string
Clean up: delete old instance after verification
